economic_notes: Nation is party to a Management Action Plan with ISC due to certain deficiencies. Agricultural Benefits Claim in progress against the Crown. COVID-19 impacted operations including reduced gaming revenues and Band Office closure. Assets under construction include Water Treatment Plant, School Upgrade, Solid Waste Transfer Station, and Lagoon Upgrade.
notes: Fiscal year is March 31, 2021 (not 2024). Nation consolidated two wholly-owned subsidiaries: Kinistin Bison Inc. and 102009262 Saskatchewan Ltd. Nation is subject to a Management Action Plan with ISC. A forensic review identified $355,000 potentially recoverable by ISC which is disputed. Agricultural implements claim loan of $938,308 is outstanding. Total government transfers estimated as ISC ($5,336,917) + STC Health ($2,213,540) + FNIHB ($1,001,137) + STC Inc. ($453,101) + CMHC ($262,727) = $8,867,422. Funds held in trust of $1,130,836 includes $850,000 loan proceeds from First Nations Bank subsequently disbursed post year-end. No remuneration schedule extracted from available text. Chief and council expenses were $270,045.
